sharedEntities.description: Core loan entity containing identifier and sale status information. Flows from data-utils as source of truth to hooks for event publishing.
Entity representing the investor associated with loans. Data-utils resolves/updates this information while hooks service publishes changes via InvestorChanged events.

dataFlows.name: Loan Sale Status Change Notification
dataFlows.description: When a loan's sale status changes, the change is captured and notifications are published to downstream systems
steps: Notification sent to CosLending Hooks Hub

dataFlows.name: Batch Purchase Accounting Flow
dataFlows.description: When batch purchases complete, account mapping occurs and notifications are sent
steps: data-utils resolves accounts from multiple sources
Proper account mappings updated in SellingDB

integrationPoints.description: Loan account mappings are persisted to SellingDB by data-utils and then read by the hooks service to enrich event notifications with proper financial account information
Loan selling events (status changes, batch purchases, etc.) are published as standardized notifications via NServiceBus
Retrieves loan accounting information needed to resolve the proper financial accounts for loans

patterns.description: Exposes an endpoint to receive domain events and transforms them into standardized notifications that are published to subscribers
Resolves and integrates account data from multiple sources (accounting API and databases) to create a unified view
Domain events are published as notifications to inform downstream systems of changes in loan selling status and operations

ambiguities: How the TrueUpVolumeFeeCharged event in COS.Lending.Selling.Hooks gets the fee account information it needs to process charges
Which system triggers the account resolution process in cos-lending-selling-data-utils before loan selling events occur
How CustomPurchaseAccountMapping rules in cos-lending-selling-data-utils are maintained and by which system
How the FeeSweep entity in cos-lending-selling-data-utils interacts with the hooks system for fee-related notifications
